speaker: spk_0
sentence: Let's practice the phrases you need to know at the hospital.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: If you are staying in Korea, remember 01/2019 in case of emergency.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: I need to see a doctor.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: Is there an English speaking doctor here?

speaker: spk_0
sentence: I have a headache.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: I have a sore throat.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: I have pain here. I have indigestion.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: I have a fever.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: I have a cold I sprained my ankle I got burned. I have diarrhea.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: When did the pain start?

speaker: spk_0
sentence: Please lie down here.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: Are you taking any medication now?

speaker: spk_0
sentence: I take a painkiller I will give you a shot.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: You need to take a rest.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: You need an operation immediately.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: You need to be hospitalized.

speaker: spk_0
sentence: How long will it take until I recover?

sentence: Take this prescription to the pharmacy.

sentence: How do I take this medicine?

sentence: I have travelers' insurance.
